neighborhoods.name: Barri Gotic (Gothic Quarter)
neighborhoods.description: Medieval heart of Barcelona with narrow alleys, Roman ruins, Barcelona Cathedral, and vibrant squares
neighborhoods.character: Medieval Gothic, dense walkable, vibrant nightlife

housing.predominantType: Apartments in medieval and renovated historic buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Barcelona. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Gracia
neighborhoods.description: Former independent village now a bohemian neighborhood with plazas, boutiques, and Gaudi's Park Guell

housing.predominantType: Apartments in modernista and traditional buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Barcelona's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Hospitalet de Llobregat
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent municipality with lower rents, Metro access, and diverse multicultural community

housing.predominantType: Apartments in modern and older residential blocks

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Eixample
neighborhoods.description: Cerdas grid district with iconic Gaudi buildings, wide avenues, and the highest international resident density

housing.predominantType: Apartments in modernista and Art Nouveau buildings

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
